name: Joint Return Election for Spouses in Missing Status

eligibility.description: Applies to spouses of members of uniformed services or civilian employees in missing status as a result of service in a designated combat zone.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows the spouse of an individual in 'missing status' due to combat zone service to file a joint return, preserving favorable tax rates and deductions.
